about.name: Md. Sahadat Hossain
about.bio: I am a dedicated Full-Stack Web Developer with a passion for building highly interactive, accessible, and performant web applications. Specializing in the MERN Stack, TypeScript, and modern styling solutions like Tailwind CSS, I love creating clean architectures and seamless digital experiences.

projects.title: TechMart E-Commerce Ecosystem
projects.description: A high-performance full-stack e-commerce solution with custom payment gateways, secure authentication, real-time stock counts, and a comprehensive order status admin tracking module.

projects.title: SaaS Analytics & Operations Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive real-time telemetry dashboard representing revenue cohorts, user retention logs, server uptime statuses, and dynamic report generators with beautiful graphical models.

projects.title: DevConnect Professional Network
projects.description: A social network and collaboration platform for developers. Includes real-time chat, project pairing searches, interactive developer profiles, and a Q&A community forum.

inquiries.name: Jane Doe
inquiries.subject: Inquiry: Full-Stack React Project Collaboration
inquiries.message: Hi Nijam, I saw your portfolio and would love to discuss a remote freelance React role we have available. Let me know if you are open for a quick call this week!
